name: Nigerian Restaurant
description: Soups, swallows, rice dishes, grills, small chops & drinks — ready to customise

categories.name: Soups
categories.ada_message: Our soups are made fresh every morning! 🥣 Tap any soup to learn more about it.

items.name: Egusi Soup
items.description: Rich ground melon seed soup with assorted meat
items.ada_message: Egusi is loaded with protein and healthy fats — great with pounded yam! 💪

items.name: Ofe Onugbu
items.description: Bitterleaf soup with assorted meat and stockfish — an Igbo classic
items.ada_message: A true Igbo classic! The slight bitterness is what makes it special 😋

items.name: Oha Soup
items.description: Seasonal delicacy with cocoyam thickener and oha leaves
items.ada_message: Oha leaves are packed with vitamins A and C — very nutritious! 🌿

items.name: Ogbono Soup
items.description: Draw soup with assorted meat — smooth and filling
items.ada_message: Ogbono is great for digestion and keeps you full for hours 👌

items.name: Nsala Soup
items.description: White soup with fresh catfish — light and fragrant
items.ada_message: Light and fresh! Very popular with our guests 🐟

items.name: Ofe Akwu
items.description: Palm fruit soup — a true Eastern Nigerian classic
items.ada_message: Rich in vitamin E and antioxidants — good for your skin and heart! ✨

categories.name: Swallows
categories.ada_message: Pounded yam is our most popular swallow! 😋 It pairs perfectly with any soup on our menu.

items.name: Pounded Yam
items.description: Smooth and satisfying — our most popular swallow
items.ada_message: Our number one! Freshly pounded, smooth and stretchy — pairs with any soup 🤩

items.name: Eba (Garri)
items.description: Light and quick — perfect everyday meal
items.ada_message: Eba is light on the stomach, very filling, and quick to prepare!

items.name: Fufu
items.description: Traditional and filling — the original swallow
items.ada_message: High in resistant starch which feeds the good bacteria in your gut 💚

items.name: Semolina
items.description: Smooth texture, easy on the stomach
items.ada_message: Super smooth and easy to swallow — popular with guests who prefer it mild 😊

items.name: Wheat
items.description: High in fibre — the healthy swallow choice
items.ada_message: The healthiest swallow we offer! High in fibre and nutrients 🌾

categories.name: Rice Dishes
categories.ada_message: Our Jollof Rice is smoky and cooked the party way 🍚 — the real deal!

items.name: Jollof Rice
items.description: Smoky party-style jollof — cooked over firewood
items.ada_message: The real deal! Smoky bottom-pot jollof cooked over firewood 🍚🔥

items.name: Fried Rice
items.description: Colourful and flavourful with mixed vegetables and proteins
items.ada_message: Colourful, flavourful, and loaded with vegetables 🥕

items.name: White Rice & Stew
items.description: Classic comfort food with rich tomato stew
items.ada_message: Classic Nigerian comfort food — sometimes simple is best 🍅

items.name: Coconut Rice
items.description: Fragrant and creamy — a weekend favourite
items.ada_message: Fragrant coconut rice that sells out fast — grab it while you can! 🥥

categories.name: Grills & Peppered
categories.ada_message: Everything here is grilled fresh to order 🔥 The suya is an absolute must-try!

items.name: Peppered Chicken
items.description: Spicy and tender — marinated and grilled to perfection
items.ada_message: Marinated for hours before hitting the grill — the flavour goes all the way in! 🔥

items.name: Suya
items.description: Skewered beef with our secret spice blend
items.ada_message: Our suya spice blend is a family secret 🥩

items.name: Peppered Gizzard
items.description: Crunchy, spicy, and completely addictive
items.ada_message: High in protein, low in fat — and absolutely addictive! 😄

items.name: Peppered Fish
items.description: Fresh catfish, heavily peppered and grilled
items.ada_message: Fresh catfish, heavily peppered 🐟🔥 A real crowd favourite!

items.name: Peppered Ponmo
items.description: Soft cow skin, peppered and stewed
items.ada_message: Soft, chewy ponmo in our peppered sauce — great as a side 😋

categories.name: Small Chops
categories.ada_message: Perfect for sharing or a light snack! Our puff puff is made fresh every morning 🤤

items.name: Puff Puff
items.description: 6 pieces — soft, sweet, freshly fried
items.ada_message: Made fresh every morning — soft, golden, and slightly sweet 🤤

items.name: Meat Pie
items.description: Flaky pastry filled with spiced minced meat
items.ada_message: Baked fresh, never reheated! Flaky golden crust with perfect filling 🥧

items.name: Moi Moi
items.description: Steamed bean pudding — high in plant protein
items.ada_message: Loaded with plant protein — great for energy and keeps you full 💪

items.name: Spring Roll
items.description: 4 pieces — crispy fried rolls with vegetable filling
items.ada_message: Crispy outside, loaded with veggies inside — perfect for sharing! 🥬

items.name: Buns
items.description: Sweet fried dough balls — a Nigerian classic
items.ada_message: A Nigerian childhood classic! Sweet, soft, and dangerously addictive 😄

categories.name: Drinks
categories.ada_message: We have cold drinks to go with your meal — ask your waiter! 🥤

items.name: Coca-Cola
items.description: Ice cold
items.ada_message: Nothing beats an ice cold Coke with your meal! 🥤

items.name: Fanta Orange
items.description: Ice cold
items.ada_message: Sweet and fizzy — great for cooling down after spicy dishes! 🍊

items.name: Sprite
items.description: Ice cold
items.ada_message: Light and refreshing — perfect to cleanse the palate 💚

items.name: Maltina
items.description: Rich in B vitamins — great energy boost
items.ada_message: Loaded with B vitamins — a natural energy boost! 🌟

items.name: Water (50cl)
items.description: Ice cold
items.ada_message: Stay hydrated! Especially important with the spicy dishes 💧

items.name: Guinness Stout
items.description: Ice cold
items.ada_message: Smooth, rich, and refreshing — best enjoyed ice cold 🍺

items.name: Star Lager
items.description: Ice cold
items.ada_message: Nigeria's favourite! Smooth and refreshing 🌟🍺

items.name: Chivita Juice
items.description: Assorted flavours — apple, orange, mango
items.ada_message: 100% fruit juice — great for kids and non-drinkers 🧃
